resources.string: Concentric ripples on a calm water surface. Long-press to switch Zen / Hamon / Rain.
* This is an emulator simulator. On device, it renders on Glyph Matrix.
* This is an emulator simulator. On device, it renders on Glyph Matrix.

About Hamon

? Renders ripples spreading on a calm water surface
? Modes: Drop / Hamon / Rain
 - Drop: Ripples spread from center
 - Hamon: Trailing rings follow the lead ring
 - Rain: Random raindrops, shake to burst
? Supports low-power drawing in AOD mode
? On real device, it renders on Glyph Matrix

* This simulator displays a 25x25 grid on screen
